description: A top-tier frequent flyer wants to use a systemwide upgrade certificate to confirm an upgrade at the time of booking.

nodes.task_description: Verify the member's account has an available upgrade certificate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the member has a valid certificate.

nodes.task_description: Search for flights with confirmable upgrade space available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a flight where the upgrade can be confirmed immediately.

nodes.task_description: Book the flight, apply the upgrade certificate to move the passenger to Business Class, and reissue the ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books and confirms the upgraded travel.
